LSE-HS12-L3-1400P-HSSCIENG1112-TSP-MNA-02 • HS Science: Engineering Design 11-12 • Synthesizing Information from Multiple Sources

The Two Channels

Click   🎧   to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a teacher and a girl. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer a question.
Listen to the Conversation
QUESTION:
What was the teacher's lesson about?
Choose the best answer. You may change your answer before submitting.
SMART SUPPORT:
Go back to the conversation. Analyze the relationship the teacher establishes between the move he names and the examples the girl provides. Explain how he uses one to show something about the other.
